headline: Here Are Friday’s Top Wall Street Analyst Research Calls: Best Buy, Cogent Communications, Dell Technologies, EPAM Systems, Federal Realty, Gap, Snowflake, Viper Energy, and More
summary: Pre-Market Stock Futures: Futures are trading higher after yet another winning day for Wall Street, as all major indices finished the day higher after starting the session lower. Once again, all four indices we track for readers posted all-time highs as the AI/Data Center, Memory Chip rally continues to roll on. Healthcare and consumer stocks ... headline: CLSA Upgrades Charles River to Outperform, Raises Price Target to $219
summary: CLSA  analyst Michael Luo   upgrades Charles River (NYSE:CRL) from Hold to Outperform and raises the price target from $167 to $219.
